stories.title: Rai rises to the top, eclipses stars for PGA title
stories.summary: Aaron Rai shot a 5-under 65 to pull away from some of the game's biggest stars, becoming the first English-born golfer to win the PGA Championship since 1919.

stories.title: Sources: SGA wins MVP for second straight year
stories.summary: Thunder star Shai Gilgeous-Alexander has won his second consecutive NBA Most Valuable Player award, becoming the 14th player in league history to win back-to-back MVPs.

stories.title: 14-4 under Mattingly, Phils surge over .500 mark
stories.summary: The resurgent Phillies improved to 14-4 under interim manager Don Mattingly on Sunday and snuck over the .500 mark, at 24-23, for the first time since April 7 as Philadelphia blanked the Pittsburgh Pirates 6-0, completing a three-game sweep.

stories.title: Mariners call up top prospect Emerson for debut
stories.summary: The Mariners are calling up star prospect Colt Emerson, adding the No. 6-ranked prospect to the lineup for his major league debut.

stories.title: Mets swipe Subway Series after 'awesome' rally
stories.summary: Still in last place in the National League East, the Mets may have turned a corner this weekend, authoring two wins to close out the Subway Series with the Yankees, the last of which was fueled by Tyrone Taylor's ninth-inning, three-run home run Sunday.
